From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

(Redirected from [EC Bad Tölz](/w/index.php?title=EC_Bad_T%C3%B6lz&redirect=no "EC Bad Tölz"))

Sports club

| Tölzer Löwen | |
| --- | --- |
|  | |
| City | [Bad Tölz](/wiki/Bad_T%C3%B6lz "Bad Tölz"), [Germany](/wiki/Germany "Germany") |
| League | [Oberliga](/wiki/Oberliga_(ice_hockey) "Oberliga (ice hockey)") |
| Founded | 1928 |
| Home arena | [Hacker-Pschorr-Arena](/w/index.php?title=Hacker-Pschorr-Arena&action=edit&redlink=1 "Hacker-Pschorr-Arena (page does not exist)") |
| Colours | Black, yellow |
| Head coach | [Kevin Gaudet](/wiki/Kevin_Gaudet "Kevin Gaudet") |
| Captain | Philipp Schlager |
| Franchise history | |
| 1928–2001 | EC Bad Tölz |
| 2001–present | **Tölzer Löwen** |

**Tölzer Löwen** is an ice hockey team in [Bad Tölz](/wiki/Bad_T%C3%B6lz "Bad Tölz"), Germany. They play in the [Oberliga](/wiki/Oberliga_(ice_hockey) "Oberliga (ice hockey)"), the third level of German ice hockey.

## History

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=T%C3%B6lzer_L%C3%B6wen&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: History")]

See also: [Category:EC Bad Tölz players](/wiki/Category:EC_Bad_T%C3%B6lz_players "Category:EC Bad Tölz players")

The club was founded in 1928. They won the [Ice hockey Bundesliga](/wiki/Ice_hockey_Bundesliga "Ice hockey Bundesliga") twice in the 1960s. In 2005, Bad Tölz was relegated to the Oberliga. In 2017 they lost the Oberliga play-off-finals 3-1 against Dutch side [Tilburg Trappers](/wiki/Tilburg_Trappers "Tilburg Trappers") (playing in the Oberliga Nord), but they were allowed to promote to the [DEL2](/wiki/DEL2 "DEL2") as Tilburg Trappers could not be promoted as they are a Dutch team.

## Achievements

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=T%C3%B6lzer_L%C3%B6wen&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Achievements")]

* 1.Bundesliga champion: 1962, 1966.
* 2.Bundesliga champion: 1987, 1989, 1990, 1997.
* Oberliga champion: 1994, 2012.
* Oberliga Süd champion 2016.
